name: workflow show-state command prints the current state and its history length
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"current_state":"build","history":[{"to":"plan","at":"t1"},{"to":"build","at":"t2"}]}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/show-state.sh" --state-file .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'current_state=build' out.txt && grep -q 'history_length=2' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
